prompt.positive:
A faithful image-to-video continuation of the provided product still life. Start exactly from the glass serum bottle, the angled glass dropper with one suspended serum droplet, and the two truffle pieces on the pale studio surface. Preserve the exact product silhouette and item count, the readable “GRACEFACE RUSSIA / TRUFFLE EXTRACT / Face serum / 30 ml” label and its placement, the bottle opening and dropper geometry, the liquid level, transparent glass, reflections, contact shadows, original crop and aspect ratio.

The first frame already shows one droplet hanging from the pipette tip. Motion starts smoothly: the attached droplet subtly elongates under gravity, makes one gentle surface-tension wobble near the middle of the clip, then returns to a stable rounded bead still attached to the tip. By the final frames, the complete product arrangement is calm and unchanged.

Keep the camera locked and the original composition stable. Preserve the full main subject and all key scene elements in frame. No zoom, orbit, pan, tilt or reframing.

Natural studio lighting and colors, realistic liquid physics, stable lettering, coherent object geometry, smooth temporal consistency and photorealistic motion.
prompt.negative: drop detachment, falling or invented droplets, pouring serum, splashing liquid, product rotation, bottle or dropper movement, changed item count, opening or closing package, rewritten or unreadable label, logo distortion, warped pipette, changed liquid level, opaque or melted glass, detached reflections, changing material or contact shadow, camera movement, zoom, reframing, flicker, morphing, duplicated objects, motion artifacts, cartoon or CGI look
